title: Vintage Engraved Knight Helmet

imagePrompts.prompt: A clean minimalist black-and-white ink illustration of a medieval knight helmet shown as a bust portrait, centered on a plain light gray background with lots of negative space. The helmet is a classic closed great helm with a narrow horizontal visor slit, 6 vertical breathing slits on the faceplate, a rounded dome, a visible circular side rivet near the temple, and a layered gorget or neck guard with small rivets. Include draped cloth or a cloak wrapping around the shoulders and neck. Render it in a vintage engraving, etching, or woodcut-inspired style with bold black outlines, dense stippling, scratchy crosshatching, and strong high-contrast shadows. The knight is angled in a three-quarter view facing left. No text, no border, no extra objects, just a crisp emblem-like portrait floating in the center.
